hypothesis: Enhancing steric complementarity at position 11 and electrostatic differentiation at position 5 will increase SSTR2 selectivity by improving receptor-specific interactions while reducing off-target affinity.

critic_feedback_used.hypothesis: The current designs are energetically favorable but structurally invalid. Future iterations must prioritize structural quality alongside binding and selectivity.

proposed_changes.rationale: Increase the number of candidates to improve the chances of generating structurally valid designs.
Tighten the clash threshold to reduce structural artifacts and improve overall geometry.
